title: Mark Kioku vault tasks done and close the workstream
implementation_notes: Run bun test from app/ and confirm all tests pass before touching vault tasks.
Update kioku-01..06 vault tasks: set status=done, column=done, progress=100, result=<one-line summary>, completed_at=now.
kioku-01 and partial kioku-03/04 were already implemented in a prior session; document that in result field.
Optionally add a short Kioku section to docs/architecture.md documenting the local SQLite search boundary.
acceptance_criteria: bun test passes with 0 failures after all subtasks are complete.
All six kioku-* vault task files have status=done and a concrete result field.
Both .tmp workstream task.json files are marked completed.
docs/architecture.md reflects the Kioku storage and search boundary accurately.
completion_summary: Marked the Kioku vault tasks done, updated architecture docs, and confirmed the focused and full app test suites plus production build all passed.
